title: Expansion Frozen Event
description: Emitted when a hard-stop expansion gate (HSG) fires during the 3-agent pilot, freezing the planned expansion to the 7-agent workforce (design v0.2 §7.2; the B+ ratification gates expansion on zero-gates-fired + 10 success criteria met). Distinct from workforce_pause_invoked: a freeze blocks growth but does not necessarily halt in-flight pilot work. Unfreezing is ratifier-gated.

gate_id.description: Hard-stop expansion gate that fired (HSG-1 .. HSG-7 per design v0.2 §7.2)

gate_metric.description: The metric the gate watches (e.g. severity-weighted defect rate, projection-integrity, agent-stall count)

observed_value.description: The observed value that breached the threshold

unfreeze_condition.description: Ratifier-gated condition to lift the freeze
